title: activate_subscription grants current subscription_days not promised duration
description: In payment_watcher.rs activate_subscription: when the invoice is expired (payment arrived late), the code grants max(invoice_expires_at, now + subscription_days). If SUBSCRIPTION_DAYS was changed after invoice creation (e.g. operator reduces from 30 to 7), a user who paid for 30 days but whose invoice expired before confirmation now only gets 7 days. The function should grant max(invoice_expires_at, now + duration_that_was_promised_at_invoice_creation). The invoice row does not store duration_days — it only stores expires_at. When the invoice is still valid (not expired), the correct value is invoice.expires_at. When expired, the operator change affects the late-payment path unexpectedly.
